SEARCH
Package model.user

Class User

java.lang.Object
model.user.User
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, Subscribable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Employee, Student
public abstract class User extends Object implements Comparable<User>, Serializable, Subscribable
Base class for all authenticated users in the university system.

The class stores shared identity, contact, login, password, and language information. It also provides common behavior such as news viewing, password changes, equality by login, and journal subscription notifications.

See Also:

    • User

  • Method Details

    • getRole

      public abstract String getRole()
      Returns a display name for the concrete system role.
      Returns:
      role name shown in menus and user listings

    • viewNewsTab

      public String viewNewsTab()
      Builds a formatted list of university news visible to the user.
      Returns:
      news list, or a message if no news is available

    • signIn

      public boolean signIn(String login, String password)
      Checks whether the provided credentials match this user.
      Parameters:
      login - login entered by the user
      password - password entered by the user
      Returns:
      true if both login and password match

    • changePassword

      public boolean changePassword(String oldPassword, String newPassword)
      Changes the user's password after validating the current password.
      Parameters:
      oldPassword - current password
      newPassword - replacement password
      Returns:
      true when the password was changed

    • onNewPaperPublished

      public void onNewPaperPublished(String journalName, String paperTitle, String authorName)
      Receives a journal publication notification.
      Specified by:
      onNewPaperPublished in interface Subscribable
      Parameters:
      journalName - journal that published the paper
      paperTitle - title of the new paper
      authorName - author shown in the notification

      public int compareTo(User other)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<User>
